scripts.prebuild:android: source scripts/android-env.sh && npx expo prebuild --platform android --clean
scripts.sync:android-icons: source scripts/android-env.sh && npx expo prebuild --platform android --no-install && node scripts/patch-android-splash.mjs
scripts.build:apk: node scripts/patch-android-splash.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-signing.mjs && source scripts/android-env.sh && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:aab: node scripts/patch-android-splash.mjs && node scripts/patch-android-signing.mjs && source scripts/android-env.sh && cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
